title: Slicing a Slice
description: Create a new slice by taking a sub-section of an existing slice.
problemStatement:
Slices are views into arrays! Given the slice `nums := []int{10, 20, 30, 40, 50}`, create a new slice `sub` that contains only the middle three elements (`20, 30, 40`). Print `sub`.

**Requirement:** Use the `[low:high]` syntax.
hints: The `low` index is inclusive, but the `high` index is exclusive.
